offline_manga.empty_subtitle: Browse the catalog to download chapters and read them without an internet connection.

diagnostics.title: Neural Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Advanced entropy analysis and cognitive confidence mapping for neural networks.
diagnostics.error: Failed to compute neural metrics. Please retry.
diagnostics.explainer_text_card1: This tool provides deep insights into the internal states of the model during inference. By analyzing entropy distributions and logit lens trajectories, you can identify how the model forms predictions.
diagnostics.explainer_text_card2: Use these visualizations to uncover potential biases, debug unexpected outputs, and refine your prompt strategies for maximum model reliability.
diagnostics.protocol_text: Measurement Protocol: Probability amplitudes are calculated via the Animetix cognitive solver. Any observation modifies the user's initial state of consciousness vector.

liquid_nn.title: Liquid Neural Networks
liquid_nn.subtitle: Neuromorphic Engineering
liquid_nn.explainer_text_card1: Think of this as a brain that flows. Unlike standard AI that processes information in rigid steps, Liquid Neural Networks adapt on the fly to incoming data, just like biological neurons.
liquid_nn.explainer_text_card2: This flexibility makes them perfect for analyzing data that changes over time, like video streams or sensors, ensuring consistent and stable performance even when input is noisy or unpredictable.
liquid_nn.protocol_text: Integration Protocol: The state dynamics are solved using a Runge-Kutta 4th order (RK4) numerical integrator, mapping continuous input signals to neural activations.

cove_oracle.subtitle: Predictive Consciousness & Pattern Detection
cove_oracle.question_placeholder: ex: Who killed Ryuko Matoi's father in Kill la Kill?
cove_oracle.submit_query_prompt: Submit a query to initiate the CoVe engine and visualize the verification graph.
cove_oracle.explainer_text_card1: Imagine a super-smart detective that uses advanced logic to find hidden clues and predict future trends in massive amounts of information. That's the Cove Oracle for you.
cove_oracle.explainer_text_card2: It acts like a 'predictive mind,' sifting through all kinds of data (text, images, sounds) to guess what's coming next with incredible accuracy. This helps make really smart decisions.
cove_oracle.protocol_text: Prediction Protocol: Multi-modal data streams are fed into a distributed network of quantum-inspired processors, where probabilistic correlations are continuously updated via a self-optimizing Bayesian framework.

counterfactual_simulator.subtitle: Explore Alternate Timelines & Regret Minimization
counterfactual_simulator.current_reality_desc: In the main timeline, the system optimized results to maximize semantic fidelity (Fidelity: {{actualUtility}}%).
counterfactual_simulator.inference_analysis_desc: Counterfactual analysis reveals that using the prompt "{{whatIfQuery}}" {{regretCondition}}
counterfactual_simulator.inference_analysis_more_corr: would have allowed extracting more correlations from the Knowledge Graph.
counterfactual_simulator.inference_analysis_less_eff: is less effective than the current routing strategy.
counterfactual_simulator.timelines_unloaded_desc: Use the left panel to simulate a "What If".
counterfactual_simulator.warning_text_part1: Warning: The simulator uses semantic reasoning models to project virtual realities.
counterfactual_simulator.warning_text_part2: The regret score is a probabilistic measure of the utility gap between two dialogue trajectories.
counterfactual_simulator.explainer_text_card1: This lab allows you to explore 'what-if' scenarios by simulating alternate outcomes based on different decisions or prompts. It quantifies the 'regret' of not having chosen an optimal path.
counterfactual_simulator.explainer_text_card2: By understanding counterfactual regret, you can optimize your strategies and prompts to achieve superior results in various AI interactions, from content generation to decision-making.
counterfactual_simulator.protocol_text: Simulation Protocol: The simulator employs Counterfactual Regret Minimization (CFR) algorithms to iteratively analyze and optimize decision trees in incomplete information games, modeling AI interactions.
counterfactual_simulator.initial_context: The user asked who is stronger between Goku and Saitama.

ai_debate_arena.title: AI Debate Arena
ai_debate_arena.subtitle: Dialectic Reasoning & Argumentation
ai_debate_arena.explainer_text_card1: This arena pits two AIs against each other in a structured debate, testing their dialectic reasoning and argumentation skills on a given topic. Observe how they construct and defend their arguments.
ai_debate_arena.explainer_text_card2: By analyzing the debate dynamics, you can gain insights into AI logic, identify biases, and understand the nuances of machine-generated arguments, improving your own critical thinking.
ai_debate_arena.protocol_text: Debate Protocol: Two specialized LLMs engage in a multi-turn dialogue, generating arguments, counter-arguments, and rebuttals, with a third LLM acting as moderator and scoring agent.

akinetix.title: Akinetix: The Seer
akinetix.tagline: Can the AI read your mind?
akinetix.not_started: The analysis has not started yet
akinetix.who_really: Who were you really thinking of?

lobby.subtitle: Pick your mode and your universe, then let the magic happen.
lobby.mode_classic_desc: The AI asks you questions (yes / no / probably…) and tries to guess what you're thinking of.
lobby.mode_animinator_desc: The genie has a work in mind: ask it questions freely to unmask it.
lobby.mode_quiz_who_desc: A board of portraits, a hidden secret: ask questions to eliminate faces and unmask the right one.

rl.intro: You won't just play, you'll train an artificial intelligence.
rl.objective_desc: The AI must guess your character in as few questions as possible by exploring the Lore's latent space.
rl.training_desc: Every answer you give refines the neural weights of the RL (Reinforcement Learning) agent.
rl.progression_desc: The more you play, the more efficient the agent becomes at reducing search entropy.
rl.prediction: The RL agent predicts with 98.4% certainty:
